speaker: town_conversation
content:
alice: Good morning, Bob! I just heard an urgent bell ringing from the town square. I think I should head over there to see what's going on. Did you hear it too?
bob: It seems I'm already in a conversation with Alice, so I should just respond naturally as part of the ongoing dialogue.

"Good morning, Alice! I didn't hear any bell — I've been busy setting up the counter and getting the pastries ready for the morning rush. But if something's happening in the square, you'd better go check it out. I'll hold down the fort here!"
alice: I've said my goodbyes to Bob. The urgent bell from the town square needs my attention, so I'll wrap up here and head over to investigate.

"Alright Bob, I'm off to the square! I'll fill you in later."
bob: The conversation is ongoing via `start_conversation`, so I should respond naturally within the conversation framework.

"Sure thing, Alice! Be careful out there — I'll have a fresh coffee waiting for you when you get back. Let me know what all the fuss is about!"
